category_sources: source_facts.description: Command-line utility to manage Tarantool applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name: tt; official repository name is tarantool/tt.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the tt tool; Tarantool official documentation includes tt CLI reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tarantool/tt; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CLI for managing Tarantool applications.
